nodes.label: Concrete Feature Example (orders/pedidos): barrels, types, schemas, services, hooks, components, and page orchestration
nodes.rationale: Demonstrates the complete feature anatomy with real code: index.ts barrel, types with PedidoFilter/PedidoListItem, schemas for form validation, services calling api-client, hooks managing state, and PedidoCard/PedidosLista components.

nodes.label: Responsive Behavior Rules v1: card vs table breakpoints, filter strategies, pagination patterns, form layout per device
nodes.rationale: Mobile: cards only, bottom sheet filters, Prev/Next pagination. Tablet: table with essential columns, drawer filters. Desktop: full table, inline filters, numbered pagination. Same core principles as v2 but less exhaustively specified.
